summary: STEP 8 Dashboard Intelligence Layer testing completed. All StatCard component features verified: 4 stat cards render with data-testid attributes (stat-total-leads, stat-new-leads, stat-quoted, stat-booked), each card displays icon, large value with tabular-nums, label text, trend indicator, and 80x28 SVG sparkline. Click filtering works correctly - clicking a card activates it (border-brand-primary + bg-brand-primary/10), clicking Total Leads clears filter. Sparkline colors match accent colors: purple (#6C2EDB) for brand, amber (#D97706) for quoted, emerald (#059669) for booked.
critical_code_review_comments: StatCard.tsx correctly implements: Phosphor Icon type prop, TrendIndicator with up/down/neutral arrows, Sparkline SVG 80x28 with fill area and stroke line, ACCENT color map for brand/amber/green/red

Dashboard.tsx lines 691-740 correctly use StatCard with all required props: icon, label, value, trend, sparkline (placeholder data with TODO comments), accentColor, active state, onClick handler, testId
Sparkline points are placeholder arrays with TODO comments noting API doesn't provide historical data - this is expected per requirements
tabular-nums class applied to value elements for layout stability
context_for_next_testing_agent: StatCard component is working correctly. Test account has 5 total leads, 0 new, 1 quoted, 0 booked. Onboarding wizard may appear on login - dismiss with Escape or close button. Sparkline data is placeholder (TODO comments in code) since API doesn't provide historical data.

Login_Flow.details: Login with bookingtest@test.com / password123 redirects to /dashboard

Dashboard_Loading.details: Dashboard loads with no console errors

StatCard_Rendering.details: All 4 stat cards render in grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 layout with correct data-testid attributes

StatCard_Content.details: Each card shows: icon (Phosphor duotone), large value number, label text, trend text, and SVG sparkline

StatCard_Click_Filtering.details: Clicking 'New Leads' filters kanban view (card shows active border), clicking 'Total Leads' clears filter

StatCard_Active_State.details: Active card has border-brand-primary + bg-brand-primary/10 classes

Sparkline_SVG.details: Sparklines render as 80x28 inline SVGs with 2 path elements (fill area + stroke line)

tabular_nums_Font.details: Values use tabular-nums class for layout stability

data_testid_Attributes.details: All 4 cards have correct data-testid: stat-total-leads, stat-new-leads, stat-quoted, stat-booked

No_Console_Errors.details: No console errors during dashboard load and interaction
